name: percus-review
description: Percus kit Fase 7 v6.9.1 — sync com Painel pos-deploy R22 (endpoint vivo desde 2026-05-26 em ads4pros-api:fase7-20260526a). Mantém v6.9.0 (R22 alocacao central de portas), v6.8.4 (fix deepseek-review curl argv UTF-8 mangling Windows), v6.8.3 (comando /percus-review:version), v6.8.2 (smoke v6.8: fix nome lib @percus/auth nos templates), v6.8.1 (mock-scan UTF-8 + case-sensitive markers), v6.8.0 (Sprint v6.8 canonizacao auth), v6.7.2 (cross-repo R11), v6.7.1 (marketplace sync), v6.7.0 (anti-hallucination), v6.6.x, v6.5.x, v6.4.0, v6.3.0.
